definition: Reduction in people ecosystems infrastructure services or assets placed in climate harm's way
measurement_note: Use hazard maps land use asset locations and community exposure evidence

definition: Reduction in susceptibility to harm when climate stress occurs
measurement_note: Assess housing health income water access ecosystem condition labor and service dependency

definition: Ability to learn adjust rules revise plans mobilize resources and adapt under changing climate conditions
measurement_note: Review monitoring governance flexibility funding community participation and institutional memory

definition: Ability to restore essential functions after climate shocks
measurement_note: Measure recovery time completeness equity repair capacity and social support

definition: Ability to change underlying development pathways when incremental adaptation is insufficient
measurement_note: Assess relocation options land-use reform livelihood transition ecosystem restoration and rights protections

definition: Extent to which climate resilience protects highly exposed groups and addresses historical injustice
measurement_note: Use disaggregated exposure recovery participation and investment data

definition: Risk that an adaptation response deepens long-term vulnerability shifts risk or locks in unsafe pathways
measurement_note: Higher values should trigger review and safeguards
